title: Bithika Anand announces ‘Aatman Samarpan’, holistic wellness initiative for global legal community
description: Bithika Anand has announced the launch of Aatman Samarpan, a new initiative aimed at promoting the holistic well-being of the global legal community.The initiative marks Anand’s third venture after founding Legal League Consulting, a law firm management consultancy, and Human Elevation, a legal talent acquisition company.Aatman Samarpan aims to create a platform where lawyers can rediscover balance, purpose and inner strength, enabling them to perform at their highest potential while maintaining
